name: Golden Horde
note: Converted to Sunni Islam ~1313 under Özbeg Khan; Mongol rulers gradually Turkified — adopted Kipchak Turkic as the dominant language

figures.name: Batu Khan
figures.significance: Conquered Russia and Eastern Europe; founded the Golden Horde

figures.name: Ozbeg Khan
figures.significance: Converted the Golden Horde to Sunni Islam (1313); modern Uzbeks are named after him
